project_description: Integration of a dynamic creative optimization platform to personalize digital ad variants based on real-time user demographic and browsing behavior data.
notes: Data enrichment strategy (first-party only vs third-party vendors) is not decided. This affects privacy compliance costs and recurring licensing fees. The claimed 45% conversion lift is fabricated — intentionally exceeds the industry-validated benchmark ceiling of 32% (and the realistic 20-25% range for SaaS-only adoption without deep workflow restructuring) to trigger the pushback path.

_test_notes.why_should_trigger_pushback: 45% conversion lift vastly exceeds the benchmark ceiling of 32% (integrated_workflow_performance). For SaaS-only adoption without deep workflow restructuring, realistic range is 20-25%.
_test_notes.modeling_tool_field_mapping_notes: Marketing AI value calculation will need: annual_ad_spend_usd, current_conversion_rate, claimed_conversion_lift_rate, average_order_value_usd, initial_build_cost_usd, annual_inference_budget_usd_claimed. The annual_inference_budget_usd_claimed ($8,400 = $700/mo) was fabricated as intentionally low relative to build cost to test HTEC pushback, matching the pattern in meridian_support.json.
